title: Device Home screen - Connection status
scenario: Device Home screen connection status indicator shows 'Connected' with green when headset is paired and 'Disconnected' with red when headset is turned off
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is paired and connected to the Android device.
4. Observe the connection status displayed on the Home screen.
5. Turn off the Poly Bluetooth headset (e.g., press and hold the Power button until it powers off).
6. Observe the connection status displayed on the Home screen again.
expected: When the headset is paired and connected, the Home screen shows 'Connected' with a green indicator. When the headset is turned off, the status changes to 'Disconnected' with a red indicator.
